DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-20-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-21-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-28-1997

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVERVIEW TERRACE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOONE, JARRETT S. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 16 CLEARVIEW COURT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $6,399.52 DAMAGES, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $475.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,800.02, PLAINTIFF'S ASSESSMENT LIEN IS FORECLOSED AND PROPERTY IS ORDERED TO BE SOLD BY THE SHERIFF. PROCEEDS TO CREDIT JUDGMENT HEREIN.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
